cards.title: Google's AI Struggles with Basic Spelling
cards.body: Google's AI continues to embarrass the company with fundamental errors. The tech giant faces yet another public relations setback.

cards.title: Snowflake Signs $6B AWS AI Chip Deal
cards.body: Snowflake secured a five-year agreement with Amazon for AI CPU chips. The massive deal signals another challenge to Nvidia's dominance.

cards.title: Remote Grows Revenue 50% Per Employee
cards.body: The payroll startup surpassed $300M in annual recurring revenue and achieved cash-flow positivity. AI adoption drove the impressive 50% revenue-per-employee increase.

cards.title: Google I/O Reshapes Search with AI
cards.body: AI-generated answers now dominate Google Search results instead of traditional blue links. Brands face a complete strategy overhaul with minimal visibility into AI descriptions.

cards.title: Meta Launches Subscription Plans Worldwide
cards.body: Meta rolled out paid subscriptions for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp globally. The company is testing new AI and business offerings under "Meta One."

cards.title: Cognition Raises $1B at $25B Valuation
cards.body: The AI coding startup more than doubled its valuation in eight months. Cognition reached $492M in annualized revenue run rate.

cards.title: ElevenLabs Launches Music Genre-Switching Model
cards.body: ElevenLabs' new model allows mid-track genre regeneration without affecting other sections. Users can now modify specific song portions independently.

cards.title: SOND Launches Dreambuds Sleep Tech System
cards.body: Bose's former sleep head founded SOND, exiting stealth with $7M funding. Dreambuds captures 12 physiological signals to improve sleep in real-time.

cards.title: China Retains Top AI Talent Domestically
cards.body: Beijing increasingly restricts its world-class AI talent from leaving the country. China's AI boom is producing elite researchers Beijing wants to keep.

cards.title: ClickHouse Triples Revenue to $250M
cards.body: The database provider tripled annualized revenue and is plotting an IPO. A public debut is expected within the next few years.

cards.title: YouTube Auto-Labels AI-Generated Videos
cards.body: YouTube will automatically detect and label videos using significant photorealistic AI. The platform is making AI labels more prominent and visible.

cards.title: Robinhood Enables AI Agent Trading
cards.body: AI agents can now analyze portfolios and suggest trading strategies on Robinhood. Agents are limited to pre-loaded wallet balances for trades.

cards.title: DuckDuckGo Installs Spike 30% Amid Google Backlash
cards.body: Users rejected Google's AI-first Search redesign, causing DuckDuckGo downloads to surge 30%. The privacy-focused search engine capitalized on customer dissatisfaction.

cards.title: OpenRouter Doubles Valuation to $1.3B
cards.body: OpenRouter raised $113M Series B led by CapitalG, doubling its valuation in one year. Usage grew 5x in six months, signaling a multi-AI-model future.

cards.title: Human Archive Trains Robots via Indian Gig Workers
cards.body: UC Berkeley and Stanford researchers founded Human Archive to collect robot training data. The startup pays Indian gig workers to wear camera-equipped caps and sensors.

cards.title: UMG and TikTok Renew AI Music Combat Deal
cards.body: Universal Music Group and TikTok renewed their agreement to combat unauthorized AI music. UMG continues pushing platforms to implement stricter content moderation policies.

cards.title: Google's AI Embarrassment: Spelling Fails
cards.body: Google's AI system struggles with basic spelling, including the word 'Google' itself. The embarrassing mishap raises questions about the reliability of AI-generated search results.

cards.title: Snowflake Secures $6B AWS AI Chip Deal
cards.body: Snowflake signed a massive five-year agreement with Amazon for AI-specific CPU chips. The deal signals a shift away from Nvidia's dominance in AI hardware.

cards.title: Remote Boosts Revenue 50% Per Employee via AI
cards.body: Payroll startup Remote achieved $300M+ annual recurring revenue by leveraging AI adoption. The company reached cash-flow positivity while growing revenue per employee without hiring.

cards.title: AI Answers Reshape SEO Strategy Entirely
cards.body: Google's AI-generated answers now dominate search results, making traditional SEO strategies obsolete. Most brands lack visibility into how AI describes them to customers.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI-Powered Subscription Plans
cards.body: Meta rolled out paid subscriptions for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide. New AI-focused and creator offerings are being tested under the 'Meta One' brand.

cards.title: AI Coding Startup Cognition Hits $25B Valuation
cards.body: Cognition doubled its valuation to $25B in just eight months. The AI coding platform reached $492M in annualized revenue run rate.

cards.title: ElevenLabs Launches Mid-Track Genre-Switching AI
cards.body: ElevenLabs' new music-generation model allows users to regenerate song sections mid-track. The AI preserves the rest of the track while enabling genre transitions.

cards.title: China Retains Top AI Talent at Home
cards.body: Beijing is increasingly refusing to let world-class AI talent leave the country. China's booming AI sector is producing elite researchers and engineers.

cards.title: YouTube Auto-Labels AI-Generated Videos
cards.body: YouTube now automatically detects and labels videos using photorealistic AI generation. The platform is making AI labels more prominent to users.

cards.title: Robinhood Enables AI Trading Agents
cards.body: AI agents on Robinhood can analyze portfolios, develop trading strategies, and execute orders. The agents are limited to pre-loaded balances for security.

cards.title: CEOs Suffering from AI Psychosis
cards.body: Box CEO Aaron Levie warns that tech leaders are uniquely prone to 'AI psychosis.' Many executives have quasi-religious beliefs in AI productivity gains.

cards.title: DuckDuckGo Installs Surge 30% After Google AI
cards.body: DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users reject Google's AI-powered search. Google replaced traditional blue links with AI agents at I/O 2026.

cards.title: OpenRouter Doubles Valuation to $1.3B
cards.body: OpenRouter raised $113M Series B led by CapitalG, doubling its valuation in one year. Usage grew 5x in six months, signaling a multi-AI-model future.

cards.title: India Gig Workers Train AI Robots
cards.body: Human Archive pays Indian gig workers to collect robot training data via sensor-equipped gear. The UC Berkeley/Stanford startup addresses AI labs' desperate need for real-world data.

cards.title: UMG and TikTok Renew Anti-AI Music Deal
cards.body: Universal Music Group renewed its agreement with TikTok to combat unauthorized AI music. UMG continues pushing platforms to enforce stricter content moderation.

cards.title: Organizations Struggle with Agentic AI Adoption
cards.body: 85% of organizations want agentic AI within three years, but 76% lack infrastructure support. A major gap exists between AI ambitions and operational readiness.

cards.title: AI Jobs Panic Lacks Real Evidence
cards.body: Despite hysteria over AI job losses, developed countries show stable aggregate employment. Evidence that AI has significantly shifted employment numbers remains limited.

cards.title: Entry-Level Work Faces Hidden AI Crisis
cards.body: AI hasn't caused mass unemployment yet, but a troubling shift in entry-level opportunities is emerging. The impact on junior workers may be hiding beneath stable aggregate data.

cards.title: Google DeepMind CEO Declares AI Singularity Near
cards.body: Demis Hassabis proclaimed we're 'standing in the foothills of the singularity' at Google I/O. The statement signals confidence that AI will soon exceed human intelligence.

cards.title: World Models Shift AI Discussion Forward
cards.body: World models are emerging as the key to overcoming LLM limitations in AI. Recent developments suggest systems can now better understand the external world.
